subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward My countenance and hast drunk the choice wine of revelation from the chalice of Mine utterance! Hearken unto My call from this direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المتوجه الی وجهی و الشارب رحیق الوحی من کاس بیانی اسمع ندائی من شطر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
